overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban commercial district. The player moves through covered plazas with reflective wet floors, along elevated walkways overlooking traffic, and past massive digital billboards with cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with neon portal frames and digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered commercial plaza with reflective wet floors and cyan neon lighting

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket taking a photo with a phone

entered.detail: large rectangular cyan neon light frame forming a portal structure overhead
bright digital screen displaying anime-style characters in pink and yellow tones
tall modern building with reflective glass exterior and interior lighting visible
large white rectangular planter box containing small palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian plaza with highly reflective wet floors mirroring the cyan neon portal frames overhead. Digital billboards display vibrant anime characters on the left while pedestrians walk through the space. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy neon illumination and modern glass architecture surrounding the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with glass railings viewing highway traffic

events.description: exits covered plaza onto elevated walkway revealing multi-lane highway below

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass railing to observe the traffic and cityscape below

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing at the edge of the elevated walkway
multi-lane road visible below the overlook with traffic moving in both directions
cars and trucks with headlights visible traveling on the highway below

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered plaza to an elevated overlook with glass railings, revealing a multi-lane highway below with sparse traffic. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and ambient city glow as the sky becomes partially visible. The camera approaches the railing to observe the vehicles moving along the road beneath.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: turns right while walking to follow the curve of the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway observing the neon-lit cityscape and traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction along the glass railing

entered.detail: elevated connecting bridge spanning across the street between buildings
tall vertical digital advertisement screen on the side of a skyscraper
tropical palm trees visible in planters along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated walkway, the camera moves past glass railings with views of the traffic below. The path curves to the right, revealing an overhead bridge structure connecting distant buildings. Palm trees line the left side while large vertical billboards illuminate the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with large vertical Ponches advertisement

events.description: turns inward from the overlook into a covered area with the large Ponches moon billboard

agents.ego_description: walking past the large Ponches advertisement and neon checkerboard walls

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench using a device

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying two moon faces with PONCHES text
wall with alternating pink and cyan neon squares creating a checkerboard pattern
metal bench positioned against the wall for seating

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions back into a more enclosed commercial area dominated by a massive Ponches billboard featuring two moon faces. The right side features a vibrant neon checkerboard pattern in pink and cyan. A person sits on a bench to the left using a device while the glass railing recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level sidewalk with neon-accented building base

events.description: descends to street level alongside a building with cyan neon base lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk at street level with neon reflections on the pavement

entered.detail: smooth building wall with continuous cyan neon light strip running along the base
dark wet concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
intersection of streets visible ahead with traffic lights and crossing pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to street level, walking alongside a building with distinctive cyan neon base lighting. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the vibrant neon lights from the surrounding urban environment. The camera moves toward a street intersection visible in the distance with sparse pedestrian and vehicle activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched commercial district, moving from a sheltered plaza to an elevated overlook and finally back down to the street level. It begins in a covered pedestrian plaza where cyan neon portal frames and anime billboards reflect off highly polished wet floors. As the camera moves forward, the space opens onto an elevated walkway with glass railings, shifting the perspective to reveal a multi-lane highway and a distant overhead bridge framed by palm trees and vertical displays. The scene then curves back into an enclosed commercial area dominated by a massive Ponches billboard and vibrant pink and cyan checkerboard patterns. Finally, the camera descends to the street level, gliding along a building with cyan base lighting across a wet concrete sidewalk toward a distant urban intersection.
